title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF DARAGA, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, TO MUNICIPALITY OF LOCSIN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3127 / 55 OG No. 37, 7887 (September 14, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2505, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF DARAGA, PROVINCE OF ALBAY, TO MUNICIPALITY OF LOCSIN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Daraga, Province of Albay, is changed to Municipality of Locsin.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
